A '''Kashyyyk bladestick''' was a [[Polearm/Legends|polearm]] or [[Spear/Legends|spear]] used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The handle was made of wood and it had two long, thin blades on both ends. The blades were engraved. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], one of these weapons was owned by the Wookiee [[Chatook]] and used by his son, [[Takook]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
